description: 2x Mana Bolt I = Mana Bolt II
2x Guardian's Presence I = Guardian's Presence II
Healing Light + Med Supplies + First Aid = Healing Light II
Mana Bolt II + 2x Monster Core = Core Powered Strike
Guardian's Presence II + 2x Reinforced Steel = Steel Vanguard
Repair I + Broken Circuitry + Toolbox = Repair II
Repair II + 2x System Shard = Repair III
Shield I + 2x Reinforced Steel = Shield II
Shield II + 2x System Shard = Shield III
Battery I + 2x Broken Circuitry = Battery II
Battery II + 2x System Shard = Battery III
Healing Light II + 2x First Aid Kit = Healing Light III
Core Powered Strike + 3x Monster Core = Mana Bolt III
Mana Bolt III + 2x System Shard = Mana Bolt IV
Steel Vanguard + 3x Reinforced Steel = Guardian's Presence III
Guardian's Presence III + 2x System Shard = Guardian's Presence IV
Cloth Armor + 2x Salvaged Parts = Leather Armor
Leather Armor + 2x Reinforced Steel = Chainmail Armor
Chainmail Armor + 2x Reinforced Steel + Monster Core = Plate Armor
Plate Armor + 2x System Shard + Broken Circuitry = Power Armor
